root_text.an6.81:1.1: “Chahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an6.81:1.3: Pāṇātipātī hoti, adinnādāyī hoti, kāmesumicchācārī hoti, musāvādī hoti, pāpiccho ca, micchādiṭṭhi ca.
root_text.an6.81:1.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ niraye.
root_text.an6.81:2.1: Chahi, bhikkhave, dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge.
root_text.an6.81:2.3: Pāṇātipātā paṭivirato hoti, adinnādānā paṭivirato hoti, kāmesumicchācārā paṭivirato hoti, musāvādā paṭivirato hoti, appiccho ca, sammādiṭṭhi ca.
root_text.an6.81:2.4: Imehi kho, bhikkhave, chahi dhammehi samannāgato yathābhataṁ nikkhitto evaṁ sagge”ti.

translation_text.an6.81:1.1: “Mendicants, someone with six qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an6.81:1.3: They kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, and lie. And they have corrupt wishes and wrong view.
translation_text.an6.81:1.4: Someone with these six qualities is placed in hell as if delivered there.
translation_text.an6.81:2.1: Someone with six qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.
translation_text.an6.81:2.3: They don’t kill living creatures, steal, commit sexual misconduct, or lie. And they have few desires and right view.
translation_text.an6.81:2.4: Someone with these six qualities is placed in heaven as if delivered there.”
